title: Review Body on Doctors’ and Dentists’ Remuneration Fifty Third Report: 2025
body: "This report sets out the DDRB’s recommendations for doctors’ and dentists’ pay in England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland.    The DDRB provides independent advice on the pay of doctors and dentists in the NHS and HSC to the:     Prime Minister and Secretary of State for Health and Social Care    First Minister of Scotland and the Cabinet Secretary for Health and Social Care    First Minister of Wales and the Cabinet Secretary for Health and Social Care    First Minister and Deputy First Minister of Northern Ireland and the Minister of Health    For England the Government responded to the report in Parliament.  "
